log_levels.name: TRACE
log_levels.description: Most detailed logs for deep Terraform core and provider debugging.

log_levels.name: DEBUG
log_levels.description: Detailed debug logs for troubleshooting unexpected behavior.

log_levels.name: INFO
log_levels.description: General informational logs such as Terraform version and runtime details.

log_levels.name: WARN
log_levels.description: Warning messages that may indicate risky or unusual behavior.

checklist.question: What is the root cause instead of only the surface error?
Is TF_LOG set to a suitable level for the issue?
Is TF_LOG_PATH set so detailed logs are saved to a file?
